Home › Brevard County › West Melbourne › MOE'S SOUTHWEST GRILL #36
A 100

MOE'S SOUTHWEST GRILL #36

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: June 10, 2026

MOE'S SOUTHWEST GRILL #36 is a Other restaurant at 225 PALM BAY RD SUITE 185 in West Melbourne, Brevard County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on June 10, 2026, it received a grade of A with a score of 100 out of 100. Inspectors recorded no outstanding violations. By health score, it is safer than 100% of Brevard County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.2 stars across 990 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $10–20 range. Menu options are noted as suitable for vegetarian, gluten-free, dairy-free, keto, and healthy diners.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 17 days ago

Get directions Call (321) 676-8811
